description: Generate, transform, transcribe, dub, and manage AI audio, voices, music, and conversational agents with ElevenLabs.

novel_features.name: Voice Discovery
novel_features.description: Search owned and shared ElevenLabs voices through one compact, JSON-first command.

novel_features.name: TTS Resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve a voice, model, output format, default settings, and subscription context before rendering.

novel_features.name: TTS Render Manifest
novel_features.description: Render text to an audio file and print a structured manifest with file path, byte count, model, and voice.

novel_features.name: Dialogue Cast
novel_features.description: Render speaker-labelled dialogue lines by resolving speaker-to-voice assignments and saving audio.

novel_features.name: Podcast Produce
novel_features.description: Turn an annotated script into a finished, mixed podcast episode: multi-host VO, music beds ducked under speech, SFX, EBU R128 loudness, plus transcript and chapters. Requires local ffmpeg.

novel_features.name: Podcast Master
novel_features.description: De-noise and normalize an episode to broadcast loudness (EBU R128, -16/-14 LUFS, true-peak limited) with a before/after report. Requires local ffmpeg.

novel_features.name: Podcast SEO Package
novel_features.description: Turn a finished episode into an SEO/GEO discovery package: transcript, SRT/VTT, Apple-compatible chapters, keyword-targeted show notes, A/B title variants, and pull-quotes, with forced-alignment when a script is known or speech-to-text when only audio is available.

novel_features.name: Podcast Clip Extractor
novel_features.description: Score an episode's transcript windows for short-form potential (hook/flow/value), then cut and caption the top N as audio or multi-aspect video clips for TikTok/Reels/Shorts. Requires local ffmpeg.
